properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 63/24
 1. M/V SW AMUNDSEN AND SW GALLIEN IS CONDUCTING SEISMIC SURVEY OPERATIONS FROM 06 JUNE TO 14 JULY 2024. TOWING 8 SESMIC CABLES AT 2,3NM LENGTH 
 IN AREA BOUNDED BY: 

 A. 65-31.0N 007-01.5E
 B. 65-22.5N 007-50.1E
 C. 65-11.5N 007-39.2E
 D. 65-19.4N 006-51.0E
 E. 65-31.0N 007-01.5E

 2.WIDE BERTH REQUESTED, MINIMUM 3.5NM ASTERN AND 1NM MILES AHEAD AND BOTH SIDES 
 SUPPORT VESSELS M/V MARIA G AND AMBER G

 3.END OF SEISMIC SURVEY: 15 JULY 2024
